name: Marmalade Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until soft and add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well between each addition.
3. Mix in the marmalade, sultanas, and flour.
4. Turn the batter into a greased and bottom-lined deep 7-inch cake tin. Level the surface.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 - 1 1/2 hours or until a skewer comes out clean.
6. Cool for 15 minutes, then turn out onto a rack to cool completely.
